name: construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, missed equipment maintenance causes project delays. We provide daily reminders instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules.
problem_solved: missed equipment maintenance leads to project delays and increased costs
